did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper used Multivariate Curve Resolution-Alternative Least Squares (MCR-ALS) for spectral unmixing and Partial Least Squares-Discriminant Analysis (PLS-DA) for classification. These are traditional multivariate statistical and chemometric methods, not AI, machine learning, or deep learning algorithms. The study explicitly contrasts its approach with previous AI-based studies (e.g., Lui et al.) and does not employ neural networks or modern ML techniques.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
